title: InputChangedEventHandler Object
description: An event handler base class that a client derives from to handle events triggered by a InputChangedEvent. A client implemented instance of this class can be added to a InputChangedEvent to receive these event notifications.

methods.name: notify
methods.description: This notify member is called when an event is triggered from any event that this handler has been added to.

notify.title: InputChangedEventHandler.notify Method
notify.description: This notify member is called when an event is triggered from any event that this handler has been added to.

parameters.name: eventArgs
parameters.description: The arguments object with details about this event and the firing InputChangedEvent.
